protocolDirs.description: Relative paths to protocol directories to scan recursively (default: ["memory/protocols"])

pinnedDocs.description: Relative paths to docs that are always injected regardless of score (e.g. ["memory/protocols/PROTOCOLS-HUB.md"])

maxResults.description: Max number of ranked docs to inject (default: 3). Does not count pinned docs.

maxDocLines.description: Truncate injected docs to this many lines (default: 100 for token burn mitigation)

ollamaBaseUrl.description: Ollama base URL for embeddings (default: http://localhost:11434). WARNING: if remote, sends prompt text and full indexed markdown content (including secrets/API keys in docs) to that host for embedding. Keep local (localhost/127.0.0.1/::1) to avoid trust-boundary change.

minPromptLength.description: Minimum prompt length to trigger preflight (default: 20)

minScore.description: Minimum cosine similarity score to inject a doc (default: 0.3). Check debug logs for score output to tune this.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms for embedding calls (default: 10000)
